todos.content: Create unified upload handler (app/lib/filesystem/upload-handler.ts)
Refactor upload API route (app/api/upload/attachment/route.ts)
Create file access API (app/api/files/[id]/route.ts)
Update chat component attachments (CanvasAgentChat.tsx)
Update agent context with MediaPath (stream/route.ts)
Test upload functionality
Commit changes
Fix: Resolve API file references in message normalization
Feature: Unread AI response indicator in session history

changes: Added lastMessageAt and lastViewedAt columns to piSessions schema
Updated session-store.ts with markPiSessionAsRead and updatePiSessionLastMessageAt helpers
Extended /api/sessions GET to include hasUnread flag
Extended /api/sessions PATCH to support markAsRead and lastMessageAt updates
Added blue dot indicator in session history for unread responses
Added unread banner in chat when entering session with unread AI responses
Added translations: unreadResponse, newResponseReceived, markAsRead (de/en)
Created migration script: scripts/migrate-add-session-tracking.js

behavior.unreadIndicator: Blue dot appears left of session title when AI responded and user hasn't opened session yet
behavior.markAsRead: Session marked as read when user clicks on it in history
behavior.banner: Shows 'New response received' banner when entering session with unread messages
behavior.lastMessageAtUpdate: Updated when AI response completes (message_end event)
behavior.multiTabSync: Database-backed sync works across multiple browser tabs/devices

todos.content: Feature: Enhanced toast notifications with multi-tab support

changes: Page visibility tracking using document.visibilityState API
Route & activity tracking (pathname changes, showHistory state)
Session creation on component mount (not just on first message)
BroadcastChannel 'canvas-chat-unread' for multi-tab communication
Dynamic toast duration: 4s (visible) or 10s (tab was hidden)
Toast shows on ALL routes (home, settings, terminal, etc.)
Session title stored from user input before AI responds
Proper cleanup on component unmount

behavior.toastTrigger: message_end event when AI response completes
behavior.toastDuration: 4s if tab visible, 10s if tab was hidden
behavior.toastAction: Opens session in current tab (relative route: /chat or /notebook)
behavior.multiTab: BroadcastChannel sends toast to all tabs, each tab decides to show based on active session
behavior.suppressCondition: Only suppress if user is actively viewing the EXACT session where AI responded

testScenarios.1: User writes message, AI responds, user in same session → NO toast (live)
testScenarios.2: User writes message, switches to history while AI thinks → Toast after 4s
testScenarios.3: User writes message, navigates to / (home) → Toast after 4s
testScenarios.4: User writes message, navigates to /settings → Toast after 4s
testScenarios.5: User writes message, tab becomes hidden → Toast after 10s on return
testScenarios.6: User has 2 tabs open, AI responds in Tab A → Toast in Tab B (different session)
testScenarios.7: User on home page, AI responds → Toast with 'Open session' link
testScenarios.8: User clicks toast action → Opens session in current tab
testScenarios.9: User on /chat?session=A, AI responds in Session B → Toast (wrong session)
testScenarios.10: User on /chat?session=A, AI responds in Session A → NO toast (correct session)

todos.content: WebSocket Migration: Install dependencies (ws, @types/ws)
WebSocket Migration: Create server/websocket-auth.ts (better-auth Cookie middleware)
WebSocket Migration: Create server/websocket-broadcast.ts (In-Memory Broadcasting)
WebSocket Migration: Create server/websocket-server.ts (Hauptlogik)
WebSocket Migration: Integrate WebSocket-Server in server.js (Upgrade-Handler)
WebSocket Migration: Add WEBSOCKET_ENABLED feature flag to .env.local
WebSocket Migration: Create app/lib/websocket/client.ts (Client-Klasse mit Auto-Reconnect)
WebSocket Migration: Create app/hooks/useWebSocket.ts (React Hook)
WebSocket Migration: Create app/components/websocket-provider.tsx (Root-Provider für Toasts)
WebSocket Migration: Integrate WebSocket-Provider in app/layout.tsx
WebSocket Migration: Connect PI Runtime Events to WebSocket (Event-Publishing)
WebSocket Migration: Implement Read/Unread über WebSocket (mark_read Message)
WebSocket Migration: Implement Toast-Notifications über WebSocket (notification Message)
WebSocket Migration: Migrate CanvasAgentChat.tsx (SSE → WebSocket)
WebSocket Migration: Fix WebSocket indicator showing Disconnected when connected
WebSocket Migration: Fix toast showing when user is already in the session
WebSocket Migration: Fix unread indicator in history list not updating on new messages

changes: Added session-updated event listener in CanvasAgentChat.tsx
Broadcast session updates to USER (all tabs) instead of just session subscribers
History list now updates hasUnread flag when new message arrives in different session

behavior.historyUpdate: When AI responds in session B, user viewing session A sees blue dot appear in history for session B
behavior.broadcastTarget: broadcastSessionUpdateToUser sends to all user's connections, not just session subscribers

todos.content: WebSocket Migration: Create testing scripts (test:websocket:connection, multitab, read-unread, toast, load)
WebSocket Migration: Add npm scripts for WebSocket tests
WebSocket Migration: Create Playwright E2E tests (tests/e2e/websocket.spec.ts)
WebSocket Migration: Test parallel operation (WEBSOCKET_ENABLED=true/false)
WebSocket Migration: Documentation update (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md)
WebSocket Migration: Fix chat auth loop and graceful degradation

changes: Replaced manual WebSocket cookie parsing with better-auth session resolution
Made the WebSocket client auth-aware and stopped reconnect loops after AUTH_ERROR
Centralized auto-connect ownership in WebSocketProvider
Silenced subscribe/unsubscribe spam while the socket is unauthorized or disconnected
Added a calm read-only notice in chat when live updates are unavailable

verification.uiPositive: Authenticated Playwright check navigated /notebook -> /chat with a created session and showed zero auth or cannot-send console errors
verification.uiNegative: Unauthenticated Playwright check on /login showed a single auth rejection without reconnect attempts or cannot-send spam

todos.content: WebSocket Migration: Fix send_message runtime auth 401 in direct chat flow
Fix home chat prompt redirect into /notebook
Accessibility: Add missing description for mobile AI chat sheet

changes: Added an sr-only SheetDescription to the mobile AI chat sheet in DashboardShell
details.goal: Prevent the Radix DialogContent warning about a missing Description while keeping the sheet accessible

todos.content: Fix global chat notifications to use session title and reply preview across app routes

changes: Moved WebSocket-driven assistant reply notifications fully into the global WebSocketProvider
Removed duplicate in-chat toast handling so WebSocket notifications have a single display path
Added isSurfaceVisible to CanvasAgentChat so hidden notebook chat panels no longer suppress notifications
Passed real chat-surface visibility from DashboardShell and ChatShell
Always emit notification payloads from the WebSocket runtime bridge with DB session title and normalized assistant reply preview

verification.manualTesting: Skipped on request; user will verify notification behavior manually

todos.content: Fix home chat prompt intl formatting for latest session quicklink

changes: Passed latestSession.title into the next-intl placeholder for chatPrompt.latestSessionQuicklink
Removed manual string concatenation that triggered FORMATTING_ERROR at render time

todos.content: Simplify chat toast logic to always-on notifications across all routes and sessions

changes: Removed toast suppression branches in WebSocketProvider so incoming notification events always render a toast
Removed connected-gated notification listener registration to avoid event races around connect timing
Removed CanvasAgentChat visibility/activity bridge wiring that only existed for toast suppression
Removed legacy isSurfaceVisible prop passing from DashboardShell and ChatShell
Removed server-side active-session tracking helpers that were no longer used by notification delivery

todos.content: Fix /chat websocket subscription race so assistant messages stream and render reliably

currentState: CanvasAgentChat waits for useWebSocket.connected before subscribing to session events
The shared WebSocket singleton can already be open before the hook mounts, leaving the local connected flag false
That blocks subscribe_session and mark_read on /chat, so agent events never reach the chat UI
plannedFix: Hydrate the hook's connected state from the already-open singleton on mount
Verify /chat receives runtime_status and agent_event updates again

todos.content: Stabilize WebSocket toast previews for assistant response notifications

changes: Use the saved message_saved event payload as the primary source for notification previews
Fall back to the persisted assistant message in the database only when the event payload has no readable text

verification.build: npm run build attempted, but blocked by offline fonts.googleapis.com fetch in this environment

todos.content: Fix notebook session URL persistence and home prompt chat auto-open

implementedFix: Force the notebook chat panel open when a stored home prompt or session deep link is present, even if the persisted desktop layout had hidden chat
Strip ?session= from the URL after a deep-linked session is loaded into local chat state so reloads return to the generic /notebook workspace
Derive the first optimistic session title from the actual outgoing prompt text, including home-prompt sends that bypass the visible textarea input
Preserve optimistic custom titles across immediate session list refreshes so chat header and history do not briefly fall back to automatic default titles

todos.content: Improve chat runtime badge timing for immediate working and earlier ready transitions

currentState: The runtime badge waits for backend runtime_status updates, so working can appear a beat late after send
The assistant message can already be finalized in the UI while the badge still shows working until the runtime fully settles
implementedFix: Set an optimistic working phase in the chat UI as soon as the user sends a message
Flip the UI back to ready when the assistant final message is committed locally and no more tool or queue work is pending

verification.e2e: npm run test:e2e -- --grep "switch runtime badge to working immediately"

todos.content: Fix cross-session completion toast reliability and unread session history updates

currentState: Cross-session unread badges can stay stale when a session has never been opened before because null lastViewedAt is treated as read
Completion toasts currently depend on the explicit notification event, so a missed notification leaves no user-facing toast even though the session_updated event arrived
implementedFix: Use the same unread calculation for API hydration and live session_updated handling, treating missing lastViewedAt as unread once a reply exists
Add a toast fallback on session_updated so cross-session completion feedback still appears if the notification event is missed

todos.content: Align final-response ordering so toast dispatch and unread state share the same active-session rule

currentState: Toast suppression and unread suppression are currently decided in different places without a shared active-session visibility signal
A visible active chat can still drift out of sync with database read state when its final assistant message lands
implementedFix: Track the visible active chat session globally and suppress notifications only for that exact visible session
Emit notification before session_updated and auto-mark the visible active session as read when the assistant response completes

verification.eslint: npx eslint app/api/sessions/route.ts app/components/canvas-agent-chat/CanvasAgentChat.tsx app/components/chat/SessionSidebar.tsx app/components/websocket-provider.tsx app/lib/websocket/client.ts server/chat-event-bridge.ts server/websocket-server.ts app/components/DashboardShell.tsx app/[locale]/(routes)/chat/chat-shell.tsx tests/chat-cross-session-notifications.spec.ts
